complete_agent_store.runtime_only_cache: active-turn DashAgentService handles; never source/effect truth
complete_agent_store.restart_visibility: effect receipt/inspection、source metadata 与 Dash repository state 要么全部可见，要么全部不可见
complete_agent_store.request_identity: 每条 effect record 持久化完整 typed request 的 SHA-256 fingerprint，同 command/effect 但不同 payload 必须 conflict

complete_agent_recovery.create_fork_surface: source mutation 与 terminal receipt 在同一 atomic commit；提交成功但响应丢失时通过 load_effect 原样重放
complete_agent_recovery.execute_prepare: 调用 provider 或修改 Dash history 前，以 expected_effect=None 持久提交 Accepted receipt 占用 effect identity
complete_agent_recovery.execute_reconcile: Dash execute 后以 expected Accepted record CAS 为 terminal record；若进程在两者之间退出，重开后由同 request fingerprint 调用 Dash effect/history authority 幂等恢复
complete_agent_recovery.inspect: 只读取 Complete Agent durable effect ledger；Accepted reservation 必须可跨实例观察，未占用 identity 才能返回 NotApplied

atomic_commit_input.invariant: command/effect settlement、history contribution、change cursor与continuation enqueue 同一事务提交

scalar_constraints: command_id 与 effect_id 各自唯一
Complete effect_id 全局唯一并持久化 request fingerprint、typed receipt 与 inspection evidence
Complete source coordinate 唯一并与 Dash repository aggregate revision 一起 CAS
change revision + ordinal 连续且唯一
transaction_order: 锁定 effect identity 与所有 source aggregate，并校验 expected effect/repository/metadata
为 Create 建立 source metadata 与初始 Dash repository，或为 CAS 写 replacement aggregate
写 Complete effect receipt、request fingerprint 与 inspection evidence
提交后同时暴露 source/history/surface 与 effect evidence
Dash 内部执行继续按 DashAgentCommit 原子写 command/effect settlement、history、changes 与 continuation
